entry.key: $PROJECT_DIR$/Dev_yechenm/Simulatable Oblivious Transfer Protocols Based on Blind Signature/build.bat

option.name: filePath
option.value: $PROJECT_DIR$/Dev_yechenm/Simulatable Oblivious Transfer Protocols Based on Blind Signature/build.bat

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
@echo off REM Build script for Windows using PyInstaller REM Usage: run this in a Developer PowerShell or cmd with Python available >REM 1) Create and activate venv (optional) python -m venv .venv call .venv\Scripts\activate
REM 2) Install dependencies pip install --upgrade pip pip install -r requirements.txt
REM 3) Optional: run the script to confirm it works python "OT_kn_gui.py"
REM 4) Locate gmpy2 DLL and Qt platform plugin. You may need to adjust these paths. REM Example: find gmpy2 path with python -c "import gmpy2, os; print(os.path.dirname(gmpy2.__file__))"
REM 5) Run PyInstaller. You must replace paths below if necessary. SET script=OT_kn_gui.py REM You can set LIBGMP_PATH and QT_PLUGINS_PATH environment variables if needed. Otherwise PyInstaller will try to collect automatically. pyinstaller --noconfirm --onefile --windowed --name OT_kn_gui %script%
echo Build finished. Executable will be in the dist\ folder. pause

entry.key: $PROJECT_DIR$/Dev_yechenm/Simulatable Oblivious Transfer Protocols Based on Blind Signature/requirements.txt

option.name: filePath
option.value: $PROJECT_DIR$/Dev_yechenm/Simulatable Oblivious Transfer Protocols Based on Blind Signature/requirements.txt
